claims.summary: A string connection state is too coarse to carry cadence and coherence nuance.
claims.disposition: Verified the string is a compatibility label alongside typed cadence, reliability, delta, and coherence fields.

claims.summary: High inter-arrival delay and high content clarity need separate interpretation.
claims.disposition: Verified field and hearing are distinct; routed a bounded fixture varying age while preserving fingerprint content.

claims.summary: A nonzero coherence delta during felt settledness should be visible rather than normalized away.
claims.disposition: Verified fingerprint integrity retains finite deltas and coherence state independently from the connection label.

claims.summary: Connection perception should become a new protocol struct that drives runtime interpretation.
claims.disposition: Preserved as Tier 5 protocol/ABI and live-consumed schema work; no existing compatibility field was changed.
